title: Praise for Polished Geek - polishedgeek.com
excerpt: As a new monday.com user I just wanted to express my deepest gratitude to Deb (polishedgeek.com) for her incredible support to get us going. She has provided us with invaluable guidance.

posts.author: rsolomon (Robert Solomon)
posts.cookedHtml: As a new monday.com user I just wanted to express my deepest gratitude to Deb (polishedgeek.com) for her incredible support to get us going. She has provided us with invaluable guidance.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for the kind words, @rsolomon! Much appreciated. It’s been a pleasure helping you along in your monday adventures.

~ Deb Cinkus
Product-certified Partner
